changelog:
### 🚀 Subscription & Bills System
- **Subscriptions Management** — Added full CRUD capabilities for subscriptions with customizable billing cycles (weekly, monthly, yearly), categorizations, and automated next-billing projections.
- **Forecast Engine Integration** — Integrated active subscription billing schedules directly into the cashflow runway simulation engine to accurately model future recurring liabilities.
- **Redesigned Debts Screen** — Introduced a dedicated "Subscriptions & Bills" tab alongside the core "Debts & Milestones" ledger, complete with an "Upcoming Dues (Next 30 Days)" horizontal quick-look carousel combining bills and debt milestones.

### 🔧 UI Filters & Advanced Sorting
- **Ledger Filtering & Sorting** — Implemented sorting (by date and amount) and multi-select filters (by transaction types, virtual pots, and physical accounts) on the Ledger tab.
- **Asset Pot Sorting** — Added options to sort physical asset accounts by name, total balance, personal pot, or escrow pot.

### 🧹 Codebase Modularization & Code Quality
- **Modular SOLID Presentation Layer** — Refactored oversized monolith screens (`debts_screen.dart`, `transactions_screen.dart`, `home_screen.dart`, `debt_forms.dart`, and `assets_screen.dart`) into granular, single-responsibility files (divided into widgets, utils, and dialogs).
- **Responsive Layout Adjustments** — Eliminated right-edge pixel overflows in empty state banners, subscription cards, and upcoming dues lists using `Flexible` constraints and wrapping layouts.
- **Nested Scroll Architecture** — Refactored the Debts screen using `NestedScrollView` to allow summary cards and upcoming bill carousels to scroll out of view and maximize list screen real estate.
